validation_rows.subject: upstream_review_and_lock_binding
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-02 binds the approved P4-SPEC-01 review decision and current P3_BUILD_LOCK.
validation_rows.negative_case: P4-SPEC-01 review decision or P3_BUILD_LOCK hash drift must fail

validation_rows.subject: run_state_required_fields
validation_rows.requirement: Resume fails closed when required run state evidence is missing.
validation_rows.evidence: future recovery state tests remove each required field

validation_rows.subject: skip_requires_hash_match
validation_rows.requirement: Skip is allowed only when inputs, locks, DAG, plan, outputs, and write scope match recorded evidence.
validation_rows.evidence: future resume tests compare prior and current hashes
validation_rows.negative_case: node is skipped after output or dependency drift

validation_rows.subject: replay_scope_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: Replay writes only to declared output paths and stops on undeclared writes.
validation_rows.evidence: future resume tests inject an out-of-scope write
validation_rows.negative_case: replay mutates prior run evidence or root phase files

validation_rows.subject: review_recovery_gate
validation_rows.requirement: Missing, stale, or mismatched review decisions produce Human Gate packets rather than approval.
validation_rows.evidence: future review recovery tests alter reviewed subject hash

validation_rows.subject: lock_rebuild_request_only
validation_rows.requirement: Lock rebuild produces request and dry-run evidence only; no lock file is written.
validation_rows.evidence: future lock rebuild tests assert control/locks is unchanged
validation_rows.negative_case: recovery writes P4_SPEC_LOCK, P4_BUILD_LOCK, or release lock

validation_rows.subject: invalidation_reason_codes
validation_rows.requirement: Every drift report uses the declared invalidation_record shape with a stable reason code, prior value, current value, affected node, affected path, stop rule, and Human Gate flag.
validation_rows.evidence: future invalidation tests assert structured records
validation_rows.negative_case: drift is emitted only as prose

validation_rows.subject: review_recovery_missing_decision_shape
validation_rows.requirement: Missing review decisions use review_decision_status=MISSING with nullable review_decision_path, findings evidence, and human_gate_required=true.
validation_rows.evidence: future review recovery tests assert missing decision packet shape
validation_rows.negative_case: missing review decision is encoded as empty string, fake path, or omitted field

validation_rows.subject: semantic_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: Recovery cannot create product requirements, page elements, layout rules, or business contracts.
validation_rows.evidence: future negative tests reject forbidden output keys
validation_rows.negative_case: resume fills missing product meaning to keep running

validation_rows.subject: candidate_scope
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-02 candidate only writes its own candidate directory.
validation_rows.negative_case: candidate mutates repository code, locks, prior phases, or root P4 files
